preview.reviewText: Lovely spot by the water and the coffee was great. Service was a touch slow at brunch, but we'll be back.
preview.replyText: Thanks so much, Sarah. We're thrilled you loved the coffee and the view, and you're right that brunch gets busy. We're working on speeding it up, and we can't wait to see you next time.

whyBottie.title: Replies in your voice, without the busywork
whyBottie.subtitle: Most tools either post robotic responses or bury you in an enterprise dashboard. Bottie does one thing well: thoughtful replies that sound like you, on your terms.

0.title: Replies that sound like you
0.description: Bottie writes in your tone and your customer's language, not copy-paste templates. Every reply reflects your brand, whether the review comes in English, Hebrew, or Spanish.

1.title: You stay in control
1.description: Approve each draft in one tap, or set auto-publish by star rating. Let your 5-star reviews answer themselves while you handle anything below 3 stars yourself.

2.title: Insights you act on
2.description: See your ratings, response rate, sentiment, and profile performance in one clean dashboard. The numbers that move your business, not a bloated enterprise suite.

testimonials.title: Owners who got their time back

0.name: Noa Peretz
0.quote: Between the kitchen and managing staff, I never had time to answer reviews. Now every reply goes out sounding like I wrote it myself. One of my regulars even mentioned how nice our responses are.

1.name: Tom Hadad
1.quote: Honestly didn't think AI could match how we talk to customers. Took maybe 10 minutes to set up, and I've barely had to edit a single reply since. Wish I'd found this sooner.

2.name: Lina Marcos
2.quote: We used to just ignore anything under 4 stars because we didn't know what to say. Now every review gets a thoughtful reply, and we've actually seen a few unhappy customers come back.

finalCTA.title: Never leave a review unanswered again
finalCTA.description: Connect your Google Business Profile in minutes and let every review get a reply in your voice, day or night.
finalCTA.noCreditCard: No credit card required • Cancel anytime

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to the questions owners ask before they connect

0.question: How does Bottie write replies to my reviews?
0.answer: Bottie uses Google's Gemini AI to write a personalized reply for each review. It draws on your business description, your chosen tone of voice, the star rating, and any specific instructions you set for each review type, so every reply sounds like your business.

1.question: Can I review replies before they go live?
1.answer: Yes. You can run Bottie in three modes: approve every reply yourself, full auto-publish, or a hybrid where your rules decide. A common setup is to auto-publish 4 and 5-star reviews while holding anything lower for manual approval.

2.question: What languages does Bottie support?
2.answer: Bottie replies in English, Hebrew, and Spanish. Set one default language, or use auto-match so Bottie detects the language of each review and answers in the same one.

3.question: How fast does a reply get drafted?
3.answer: Bottie is notified of new reviews in real time through Google Pub/Sub, so a reply is usually ready within 1-2 minutes of the review going live. In auto-publish mode it posts straight away.

4.question: Can I set different replies for different ratings?
4.answer: Yes, and most owners do. Set specific instructions per star rating (1 to 5). For a 1-star review you might ask for an empathetic reply that offers a way to make it right, while a 5-star review gets a warm thank-you that invites the customer back.

5.question: What if Bottie writes a reply I don't like?
5.answer: In manual approval mode you can edit or reject any reply before it publishes. In auto-publish mode you can edit or delete a reply even after it goes live. Bottie also learns from your edits and gets closer to your voice over time.

6.question: Is my data safe? How does the Google connection work?
6.answer: Bottie connects through the official Google Business Profile API using OAuth 2.0, so we never see or store your Google password. Your data is encrypted and stored securely in PostgreSQL, and refresh tokens are encrypted with AES-256.

7.question: Can I try Bottie before paying?
7.answer: Yes. The free plan covers one location and up to 5 AI replies per month, no credit card required. Upgrade to unlimited replies whenever you are ready, and cancel anytime.

8.question: Can I create Google Posts from Bottie?
8.answer: Yes. Create and publish Google Business Profile posts, including updates, events, and offers, right from your dashboard. Add images, a call-to-action button, event dates, and coupon codes, then save as a draft or publish now.

9.question: What insights does Bottie give me?
9.answer: Bottie tracks Google Business Profile performance (impressions, website clicks, phone calls, and direction requests), review sentiment, category breakdowns, and topic trends. A Profile Health Score shows how complete your listing is and how well you respond to reviews.

general.title: 1. General
general.content: The following terms of service govern your use of the AI Responses service. Use of the service constitutes full agreement to these terms. Please read the terms carefully before using the service.

service.title: 2. The Service
service.content: The service provides an AI solution for managing and automatically responding to customer reviews on the Google Business Profile platform. The service includes creating personalized responses, managing businesses, and automatic publishing options.

permittedUse.title: 3. Permitted Use

userAccount.title: 4. User Account

paymentRefunds.title: 5. Payment and Refunds
paymentRefunds.content: Payment for the service is made according to the selected plan. Prices are subject to change with prior notice. Refund policy will be detailed separately.

intellectualProperty.title: 6. Intellectual Property

limitationLiability.title: 7. Limitation of Liability

changes.title: 8. Changes to Terms

contact.title: 9. Contact

meta.title: About Bottie - AI Google Review Management
meta.description: Bottie helps small businesses reply to Google reviews in their voice, automatically. See how we automate replies, Google Posts, and profile insights to save you hours.
meta.keywords: about Bottie, AI review replies, google review management, google business profile, review response automation, reputation management for small business

hero.title: About Bottie
hero.subtitle: One platform to run your Google Business Profile. Reply to reviews in your voice, publish posts, track performance, and keep your listing healthy, all powered by AI.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: Every customer review deserves a thoughtful reply, but for a busy owner, finding time to answer each one is nearly impossible. We built Bottie to close that gap. Our mission is to give every business, from a single local shop to a multi-location brand, a way to respond to customer feedback fast and in its own voice, with the insights to grow its reputation over time.

problem.title: The Problem We Solve
problem.content: Reviews drive buying decisions. 93% of consumers read reviews before they visit a business, and businesses that reply are seen as 1.7x more trustworthy. Yet most owners cannot keep up, and the cost shows: missed customers, complaints left hanging, and a profile that looks neglected.
problem.content2: An active Google Business Profile also needs regular posts, an eye on performance, and a complete, accurate listing. Doing all of that by hand, across more than one location, is too much for one person. That is where Bottie steps in.

solution.title: How Bottie Helps
solution.content: Bottie connects to your Google Business Profile and watches for new reviews in real time. When one arrives, it drafts a reply that matches your tone and your customer's language. Approve replies yourself, or turn on auto-publish and let the routine ones answer themselves.
solution.content2: Bottie does more than reply. Create and publish Google Posts from your dashboard, track impressions, clicks, and phone calls, read AI sentiment on every review, and watch your Profile Health Score so you always know what to fix next.

features.title: What Makes Bottie.ai Different
features.subtitle: A comprehensive suite of tools designed to help you manage every aspect of your Google Business Profile from one place.

aiPowered.title: AI-Powered Responses
aiPowered.description: Generates professional, contextual replies tailored to each review using Google's Gemini AI. The AI considers your business description, preferred tone, star rating, and custom instructions per rating level.

autoPublish.title: Auto-Publish or Approve
autoPublish.description: Choose to review every reply manually, or let Bottie publish responses automatically based on your rules. Configure hybrid mode where high-rated reviews auto-publish while lower ratings require manual approval.

reputation.title: Reputation Management
reputation.description: Track review trends over time, analyze sentiment distribution, identify top-mentioned topics, and view category-level breakdowns to understand exactly what customers love and what needs improvement.

multiLanguage.title: Multi-Language Support
multiLanguage.description: Respond to reviews in Hebrew, English, Spanish, and more, matching your customers' language. Auto-detect mode identifies the review language and responds in it.

customTone.title: Custom Tone & Voice
customTone.description: Configure the AI to match your brand personality: professional, friendly, casual, or anything in between. Set different instructions for each star rating to keep the right tone for every situation.

multiLocation.title: Multi-Location Management
multiLocation.description: Manage reviews across all your business locations from a single dashboard. Each location can have its own AI settings, team members, and subscription.

googlePosts.title: Google Posts
googlePosts.description: Create and publish updates, events, and promotional offers directly to your Google Business Profile. Add images, calls-to-action, event dates, and coupon codes without leaving Bottie.

performanceAnalytics.title: Performance Analytics
performanceAnalytics.description: Track how customers find and interact with your business listing. Monitor impressions from Search and Maps, website clicks, phone calls, and direction requests with detailed charts over time.

profileHealth.title: Profile Health Score
profileHealth.description: Get a real-time score for how complete your Google Business Profile is, covering business description, phone number, website, address, response rate, and average rating, with clear steps to improve.

platform.title: A Complete Google Business Profile Management Platform
platform.content: Bottie is more than a review reply tool. It is a full platform for running your Google Business Profile. From the moment a customer leaves a review to the moment you publish a promotion, Bottie covers every step of your reputation work.
platform.content2: The AI insights engine classifies every review by sentiment and category, pulls out the topics customers raise, and tracks trends over time. You get a clear, data-driven picture of your business from the customer's point of view, across service, value, cleanliness, wait time, and dozens of other dimensions.
platform.content3: Your Profile Health Score shows how complete your Google listing is at a glance. It flags missing details like your description, phone number, and website, watches your review response rate, and tracks your average rating, giving you a score out of 100 with specific actions to improve.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.content: Getting started takes a few minutes. Connect your Google Business Profile through secure OAuth, choose your locations, and set your preferred reply tone and language. Bottie then watches your reviews around the clock through Google Pub/Sub webhooks. When a new review comes in, the AI drafts a reply within 1-2 minutes and either publishes it or queues it for your approval, depending on your settings.
howItWorks.content2: From your dashboard, you can view all reviews across locations, filter by rating, sentiment, or response status, edit AI-generated replies, create Google Posts, track performance metrics, manage team access, and monitor your Profile Health Score. Everything you need to manage your Google Business Profile is in one place.

oauth.title: Secure OAuth 2.0
oauth.description: We connect through the official Google Business Profile API using OAuth 2.0. We never store your Google password, only securely encrypted refresh tokens.

encryption.title: Encrypted Data Storage
encryption.description: All data is encrypted and stored securely in PostgreSQL. Sensitive tokens are encrypted with AES-256 before storage. We follow industry best practices for data protection.

realtime.title: Real-Time Sync
realtime.description: Reviews are received in real time via Google Pub/Sub webhooks, ensuring your dashboard always reflects the latest customer feedback without polling or delays.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.content: Bottie offers a free tier that lets you manage one location with up to 5 AI-generated replies per month, no credit card required. It is a low-risk way to try the platform and judge the quality of the replies yourself.
pricing.content2: For businesses that need unlimited responses, the paid plan is $39 per month per location and includes unlimited AI-generated replies, auto-publishing, Google Posts, performance analytics, Profile Health monitoring, team member access, and priority support. Each location is billed independently, so you only pay for the locations you actively manage.

team.title: Built in Tel Aviv
team.content: Bottie is built by a small team in Tel Aviv, Israel, set on helping local businesses do well online. We know how hard it is to manage an online presence because we have seen it up close, and we built Bottie to be the tool we wished we had.
team.content2: We're committed to continuous improvement. We regularly ship new features, respond to user feedback, and optimize our AI models to generate better, more natural-sounding responses. If you have ideas or feedback, we'd love to hear from you.

cta.title: Ready to get your time back?
cta.subtitle: Join the businesses using Bottie to reply to every Google review in their voice, publish posts, and track their performance.

meta.title: Contact Bottie - Google Review Support
meta.description: Questions about replying to Google reviews with Bottie? Get in touch with our team about plans, setup, your Google Business Profile, or partnerships.
meta.keywords: contact Bottie, Bottie support, google review management help, google business profile, AI review replies

introduction.title: 1. Introduction
introduction.content: This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information when you use the AI Responses service. We are committed to protecting your privacy and maintaining the security of your information.

informationCollected.title: 2. Information We Collect
informationCollected.content: We collect several types of information:
items: Personal information: Name, email address, phone number
Business information: Business details, Google Business Profile
Technical information: IP address, browser type, operating system

useOfInformation.title: 3. Use of Information
useOfInformation.content: We use the collected information for the following purposes:

informationSecurity.title: 4. Information Security
informationSecurity.content: We use advanced security measures to protect your information, including data encryption, OAuth 2.0 authentication with Google, and secure storage in Supabase. However, no method of transmission or storage is 100% secure.

sharingWithThirdParties.title: 5. Sharing Information with Third Parties
sharingWithThirdParties.content: We do not share your personal information with third parties, except:

userRights.title: 6. User Rights
userRights.content: You have the following rights regarding your personal information:

cookies.title: 7. Cookies
cookies.content: We use cookies and similar technologies to improve user experience, analyze site traffic, and for security purposes. You can manage cookie preferences through your browser settings.

dataRetention.title: 8. Data Retention
dataRetention.content: We retain your personal information as long as your account is active or as needed for service purposes. After account deletion, information will be deleted in accordance with our retention policy and legal requirements.

policyChanges.title: 9. Policy Changes
policyChanges.content: We may update our privacy policy from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes through the site or via email. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes agreement to the updated policy.

contact.title: 10. Contact
contact.content: For questions or requests regarding the privacy policy or exercising your rights, please contact:
